title: Eval registry skeleton
objective: Introduce an eval registry that stores local smoke, acceptance regression, and factory upgrade regression definitions without depending on external eval platforms.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Create eval registry schemas for suites, cases, fixtures, commands, expected outputs, and scoring metadata.
Add at least two built-in eval suites: local-smoke and factory-upgrade-regression.
Add a CLI command for listing eval suites and optionally running no-network suites.
Store results in a deterministic JSON format suitable for later comparison.
Document how evals differ from product tests and why they do not contain raw user project data.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: 회귀 검증과 평가 결과를 저장하는 eval registry 뼈대를 만든다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
